title: Shipping Bin Compatibility
description: Rudimentary Shipping Bin compatibility with various mods
body:
This is a datapack that takes several mods, and adds to them rudimentary compatibility regarding the Shipping Bin mod.

# Required
- Forge Loader (this pack uses forge data tags)

- Shipping Bin (well, obviously)

# Optional, but recommended:
- Quark

You can ship hollow logs, among some other things.

- Alex's Caves

Types of stone can be shipped, as well as some special items from each biome. All fish and most meat products can be shipped.

- Alex's Mobs

Very, very rudimentary support. Only a few items can be shipped. All fish have been included, though.

- Create

You can ship rose quartz, and any create stone which uses stone tags.

- Farmer's Delight

I did not have the mental stamina to add dishes, sorry. You can ship crates of items, and the crops.

- Packed Up

The mangum opus of this mod. Most of the Packed Up items have been added as shippable, and the ones that haven't don't even have the items they're composed of shippable in the base mod regardless.

- The Aether

Besides from the default tags, you can ship Ambrosium, Zanite, and Gravitite.

- Artifacts

You can ship every survival mode item in this mod.

- Supplementaries

My consistency with this was pretty bad. I added some of the items.

- Neapolitan

Along with Packed Up, this took a lot of time. Each crop is shippable.

- You've Goat to be Kidding me! (Goated)

You can ship chevon.

- Naturalist

You can ship venison and bass.

- Immersive Aircraft

You can ship the materials used to make planes.

- Mermod

You can ship sea crystals.

- Iron's Spells n' Spellbooks

You can ship ink.

- IWannaSkate

You can ship a skateboard and its trucks.

Anyways, that's it. This was made for a personal modpack of mine, so don't expect updates unless I personally want them. If you want to edit this data pack, I give you full permission to add things and reupload. My hubris requires me to tell you that I would like credit, though.
I don't expect anyone to be reading this, but if you are, I hope you enjoy <3
